overview.description: The Innovator Growth Accelerated Plus ETF - July (QTJL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in enhanced growth alternatives. The fund aims for 3x the price return of Invesco QQQ Trust ETF (QQQ), subject to an upside return cap over a one-year outcome period. QTJL was launched on Jul 1, 2021 and is issued by Innovator.
